title: Basically Optimized
body:
# Need a super high performance and easy Minecraft server at a good price? Try [godlike.host](https://godlike.host/?aff_id=1323) now!
![GodLike.Host](https://godlike.host/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/godlike_logo_horizontal_join_ua_v1.png)

This is a brand new reimagined modpack for performance. It supports Sodium, VulkanMod, and Sodium+Nvidium for the best experience.

# Notes

1. The NVIDIA version can only boost performance for systems with GTX 16 series cards or any RTX card.
2. The VulkanMod version can only run on systems with a Vulkan supported GPU.
3. Java JDK 23 is recommended for stability of the game (we recommend Eclipse Temurin)

# Effectiveness 
The mod was tested by a friend on a lower end device, and they recieved around 75 FPS more, they were getting about 40 FPS before, then they were managing 150-200 FPS!

# Achievements

1. Basically Optimized v1.0.0 (Sodium only) beat Fabulously Optimized and Simply Optimized by a big margin.

Basically Optimized (same seed, same device, same location): 1014 FPS
Fabulously Optimized (same seed, same device, same location): 620 FPS
Simply Optimized (same seed, same device, same location): 665 FPS

## That's 394 FPS more than Fabulously Optimized and 349 FPS more than Simply Optimized.
